title: phyllanthus lancifolius
intro: Phyllanthus lancifolius, also known as the 'Bengal liver-flower' or 'Rakta phall', is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. The leaves of the Phyllanthus lancifolius plant are used in traditional medicine, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani practices, and are valued for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating liver and kidney disorders, and alleviating digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Phyllanthus lancifolius are often used in decoctions, infusions, and powders to harness its medicinal properties.
